name: intra_none_assign
description: Straight-line None assignment followed by attribute consumer. The simplest possible regression: no branching, no interprocedural flow.
analysis_note: result = None sets env[result]=Nullable. return result.upper() emits Consumer(result, Attribute) before the Return fact. Fires unconditionally.
task: make_title() assigns None to result and then calls result.upper(). Fix the None-dereference — result should never be None when upper() is called.
